items.raw_desc: Klórozó CF GROUP Salinator SSCmini Salt Chlorinator 20g/h:The SSCmini Salt Chlorinator is designed for disinfection of water in indoor and outdoor swimming pools with a volume up to 90 m³. This process is health and skin friendly, so even allergy sufferers and children can bathe in the pool without any worries. Another advantage is that the treated water does not have the typical chlorine smell.
